details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest day-of coordination package under $1500 for 100 guests
Task 2: Shortlist better day-of coordination package by planning meetings
Task 3: Create budget with four categories totaling 19500
Task 4: Create guest list with 10 guests and mark 3 VIP
Task 5: Save two favorite photographers with rating >=4.5 and travel included
Task 6: Schedule Full Planning consultation earliest weekday evening next month
Task 7: Create wedding day timeline with four key events
Task 8: Build custom coordination package with 3 add-ons under $600
Task 9: Create checklist from suggested tasks and mark two as high priority
